posts.text: A little mid afternoon walk around the park in my weighted vest is good for the soul...and my neck. 🚶🏻♀️ I feel like it looks a little aggressive and I'm not really sure it works, but they say it increases your caloric burn 10-15%...!? We'll see! I do like it because when I'm in a heads down recruiting mode I have to get up and move around for a 20 minute walk, it's like I'm doing a 23 minute walk. Hey, 3 minute efficiency counts! 😀 Not only am I recruiting for the Dallas roles, I'm preparing to announce the Save the Date for DisruptHR Boise! Yay! Stay tuned for the announcement tomorrow and early bird tickets 🤩 And remember to take a mid-day break! ❤️
posts.hook: A little mid afternoon walk around the park in my weighted vest is good for the soul...and my neck.
posts.name: Cammas Freeman

posts.text: The weather is cooler in Boise right now but recruiting in construction and manufacturing is HOT 🔥! Stackrock Talent has five roles open right now (more to come!) across manufacturing and commercial construction, and we're moving fast on all of them. Here are the roles we have currently ⬇️ HEAD OF OPERATIONS - Builder, lead and scale Aerospace Manufacturing | 📍Dallas, TX PROJECT MANAGER - Keep builds on schedule Commercial Construction | 📍Boise, ID SUPERINTENDENT - Run the field Commercial Construction | 📍Boise, ID SR. PM/ESTIMATOR PLUMBING Commercial Construction | 📍Boise, ID HVAC INSTALLERS/LEAD - Journeyman or provisional Commercial Construction | 📍Boise, ID Coming soon ⬇️ Aerospace Manufacturing | Dallas, TX > Head of Sales > Head of Projects > Quality Control Manager > Project/Program Manager See one that fits you or know someone you'd vouch for? Reach out to me or Laura Waite - we'd love to chat! #ManufacturingLeadership #FortWorthJobs #CommercialConstruction #BoiseJobs
posts.hook: The weather is cooler in Boise right now but recruiting in construction and manufacturing is HOT 🔥!
posts.name: Cammas Freeman

posts.text: Just back from Fort Worth after spending time onsite with our client, and I’m reminded how valuable it is to be with the people you’re supporting. There’s something different about seeing the operation in motion, meeting the team, and better understanding the challenges they’re hiring for. Recruiting is not just about filling a role. It’s about understanding the business, the culture, the pace, the expectations, and the people who make it all work. I’m grateful for clients who welcome that level of partnership and trust us to be part of the solution. I'm excited to work with such an outstanding leadership team and for what's ahead in Texas! 💙 🤍 ❤️ #Texas #Manufacturing #Hiring Stackrock Talent
posts.hook: Just back from Fort Worth after spending time onsite with our client, and I’m reminded how valuable it is to be with the people you’re suppo…
posts.name: Cammas Freeman

posts.text: I am happy to be spending the afternoon working in downtown Fort Worth near Sundance Square - what a cool area! While it's a tad warmer 🥵 than Idaho right now, it's beautiful! They say everything is bigger in Texas, the aerospace industry is no exception. 🚀 Texas is a powerhouse for manufacturing aircraft, spacecraft, defense systems, and precision parts, ranking # 3 in the nation for aerospace product and part manufacturing firms. 🚀 18 of the world's 20 largest aerospace manufacturers have operations here. 🚀 Texas is ranked # 1 in the country for aerospace manufacturing attractiveness. Excited to roll up my sleeves, let's gooooo 💪🏻 🚀 🛫 #DFW #Aerospace #Manufacturing
posts.hook: I am happy to be spending the afternoon working in downtown Fort Worth near Sundance Square - what a cool area!
posts.name: Cammas Freeman

posts.text: One of the best things I implemented a few years back was Sunday prep. Even if its only for 30 minutes, its well worth it to effectively prepare for the week. I know the times haven't done that, my Monday mornings are more hectic. Today is one of those days where I got all my personal and house chores done yesterday so I could spend a few hours today working. And, of course outside is my favorite place to work and take advantage of it as much as I can while the weather is so nice - 68 degrees and sunny! ☀️ One of my favorite spots to work is at Indian Creek Plaza in downtown Caldwell, Idaho. If you haven't been, I highly recommend! This will be a busy week with travel to a client site so I'm thankful to have this time to both chill and prepare for a successful week. Hope everyone is having an amazing Sunday! 🤩
posts.hook: One of the best things I implemented a few years back was Sunday prep.
posts.name: Cammas Freeman

posts.text: Its an extra-special Friday when you high five🫸 🫷yourself because your so excited to partner with a growth-mode aerospace manufacturing company! I can't even say enough good things about this team - the leadership, the communication, and they're good humans...these are the companies I love to help grow! Stackrock Talent will be hiring their core leadership team in Dallas-Fort Worth so stay tuned if you want to be part of something amazing! 🤩 Here's some of the initial areas we will be hiring in: Operations Sales Project Management Quality I'm headed to DFW to meet the team next week, see you soon Texas! ❤️ 🤍 💙 #Texas #Manufacturing #Jobs

posts.name: Cammas Freeman

posts.text: It’s just a backpack. It’s also the backpack I got after I was promoted into my dream job. It was the backpack I had when I got laid off from that dream job. It was the backpack that I carried around while getting up the courage to start my own business. It’s the backpack that I took to every coffee shop, networking event, potential client meeting for the last 7 years. It sat next to me at home when I was working late at the kitchen table. It’s traveled all over the country with me carrying my laptop safely. I got a lot of compliments from strangers about that backpack. It was there through the good, the bad, the sad and everything in between. I didn’t think I’d ever be attached to a backpack, but here I am. And, now I have a new backpack. It’s functional, cute-ish, and my first time using it I got a compliment! Since I’ve had this new backpack, I’ve successfully delivered another DisruptHR Knoxville and gained two new amazing clients for Stackrock Talent. 🥂 Cheers and thanks to the old grey, dirty backpack. 🙌 Let’s do this new beige (soon-to-be-dirty) backpack - new goals, new wins, new memories.
posts.name: Cammas Freeman
